'''鈭歭-p-r''' ('''kalapar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ting|ting]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ting|ting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-p-r
|-
! Lemma
| kalapar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilapar|thilapar]] || [[word:jilapar|jilapar]] || [[word:shilapar|shilapar]] || [[word:kilapar|kilapar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulapar|thuthulapar]] || [[word:jujulapar|jujulapar]] || [[word:shushulapar|shushulapar]] || [[word:kukulapar|kukulapar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulapar|thulapar]] || [[word:julapar|julapar]] || [[word:shulapar|shulapar]] || [[word:kulapar|kulapar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulapar|thulapar]] || [[word:julapar|julapar]] || [[word:shulapar|shulapar]] || [[word:kulapar|kulapar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelapar|thelapar]] || [[word:jelapar|jelapar]] || [[word:shelapar|shelapar]] || [[word:kelapar|kelapar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholapar|thotholapar]] || [[word:jojolapar|jojolapar]] || [[word:shosholapar|shosholapar]] || [[word:kokolapar|kokolapar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholapar|tholapar]] || [[word:jolapar|jolapar]] || [[word:sholapar|sholapar]] || [[word:kolapar|kolapar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholapar|tholapar]] || [[word:jolapar|jolapar]] || [[word:sholapar|sholapar]] || [[word:kolapar|kolapar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lapar|th忙lapar]] || [[word:j忙lapar|j忙lapar]] || [[word:sh忙lapar|sh忙lapar]] || [[word:k忙lapar|k忙lapar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalapar|thathalapar]] || [[word:jajalapar|jajalapar]] || [[word:shashalapar|shashalapar]] || [[word:kakalapar|kakalapar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalapar|thalapar]] || [[word:jalapar|jalapar]] || [[word:shalapar|shalapar]] || [[word:kalapar|kalapar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalapar|thalapar]] || [[word:jalapar|jalapar]] || [[word:shalapar|shalapar]] || [[word:kalapar|kalapar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalapar|shalapar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalapar|goshalapar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalapar|gokishalapar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalaparn眉|shalaparn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalaparnkn眉|goshalaparnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalaparn眉|gokishalaparn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalaparsh毛|shalaparsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalaparnksh毛|goshalaparnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalaparsh毛|gokishalaparsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaparo|shalaparo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalaparnkro|goshalaparnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaparo|gokishalaparo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalaparmu|shalaparmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalaparnkmu|goshalaparnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalaparmu|gokishalaparmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalaparsher|shalaparsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalaparnksher|goshalaparnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalaparsher|gokishalaparsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalaparng|shalaparng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalaparnkng|goshalaparnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalaparng|gokishalaparng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalaparya|shalaparya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalaparnkya|goshalaparnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalaparya|gokishalaparya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalaparyam|shalaparyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalaparnkyam|goshalaparnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalaparyam|gokishalaparyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalaparn眉sh毛|shalaparn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalaparnkn眉sh毛|goshalaparnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalaparn眉sh毛|gokishalaparn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaparn眉ro|shalaparn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalaparnkn眉ro|goshalaparnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaparn眉ro|gokishalaparn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalaparn眉mu|shalaparn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalaparnkn眉mu|goshalaparnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalaparn眉mu|gokishalaparn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalaparsh毛n眉|shalaparsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalaparnksh毛n眉|goshalaparnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalaparsh毛n眉|gokishalaparsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaparsh毛ro|shalaparsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalaparnksh毛ro|goshalaparnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaparsh毛ro|gokishalaparsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalaparsh毛mu|shalaparsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalaparnksh毛mu|goshalaparnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalaparsh毛mu|gokishalaparsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalaparon眉|shalaparon眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalaparnkron眉|goshalaparnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalaparon眉|gokishalaparon眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalaparosh毛|shalaparosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalaparnkrosh毛|goshalaparnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalaparosh毛|gokishalaparosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalaparomu|shalaparomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalaparnkromu|goshalaparnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalaparomu|gokishalaparomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalaparmun眉|shalaparmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalaparnkmun眉|goshalaparnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalaparmun眉|gokishalaparmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalaparmush毛|shalaparmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalaparnkmush毛|goshalaparnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalaparmush毛|gokishalaparmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalaparmuro|shalaparmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalaparnkmuro|goshalaparnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalaparmuro|gokishalaparmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|16f482d}}
